items.title: Rox drafting a SS when they already have a long term SS, their top prospect is a shortstop and their most exciting rookie can also play SS.
items.author: Jake Shapiro
items.body_excerpt:
Rox drafting a SS when they already have a long term SS, their top prospect is a shortstop and their most exciting rookie can also play SS.

Bell has an injury to his throwing arm, perhaps 2B is in his future. Tho his best tool is D.

There’s room for everyone, just interesting!

items.title: Bonus Hollander POTD Malcolm Mackey. Georgia Tech PF was drafted 27th in 93 by PHO. Played sparingly (22 gms) & was waiving ending NBA career in 94. Had long career from 94-05 in CBA & abroad. Listed at 6"11 in this bio but 6"7 on @bball_ref. Now sells Mercedes in Atlanta.

items.title: ICYMI: A story about former Sixers two-way player Alex Reese – one of love & grief.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
ICYMI: A story about former Sixers two-way player Alex Reese – one of love & grief.

Reese's rare jersey number means everything to him. That's why he'll keep wearing No. 65 on his back, including when he faces his old team today.

"It just helps me think of her."
www.phillyvoice.com/sixers-news-...

media.title: Former Sixers forward Alex Reese honors late mother with unique jersey number: 'It just helps me think of her'
media.description: During his time with the Sixers, Alex Reese became the second player in NBA history – and the first since 1950 – to wear 65 on his jersey. It is much more than an oddity.
